---
title: "Test: Covariant Derivative"
cadabra-deps:
    - "tests/test_covariant_derivative.cdb"
    - "tests/test_adm_kinematics.cdb"
---

If the pipeline works, this should output the covariant derivative of the tensor $T^b{}_c$ in terms of the partial derivative and the Christoffel symbols.

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

from pathlib import Path

tex = Path("results/test_covariant_derivative.tex").read_text(encoding="utf-8").strip()

print("::: {.scroll-math}")
print("$$")
print(tex)
print("$$")
print(":::")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

from pathlib import Path

tex = Path("results/test_adm_kinematics.tex").read_text(encoding="utf-8").strip()
tex = tex.replace(r"\GammaThree", r"{}^{(3)}\Gamma")

print("::: {.scroll-math}")
print("$$")
print(tex)
print("$$")
print(":::")
```
